announcements.text: Hi everyone,I have recently noticed that some biosafety hoods are not being cleaned and organized after use. Please remember that each hood should be left as clean as or cleaner than you found it.Each hood should have:A bucket containing 10-20% bleach solution for disinfecting used serological pipettesA separate bucket, lined with a small biohazard bag, for used pipette tipsOnce the biohazard bag is full, remove it and dispose of it in the red sharps container, in accordance with our lab’s waste disposal procedures.HELPFUL TIP: If your bleach is no longer the expected yellowish color, refresh or replace the bleach to ensure it remains effective.Thank you for helping keep the shared workspace clean and safe!Best,Max
announcements.html:
Hi everyone,

I have recently noticed that some biosafety hoods are not being cleaned and organized after use. Please remember that each hood should be left as clean as or cleaner than you found it.

Each hood should have:

  • A bucket containing 10-20% bleach solution for disinfecting used serological pipettes
  • A separate bucket, lined with a small biohazard bag, for used pipette tips

Once the biohazard bag is full, remove it and dispose of it in the red sharps container, in accordance with our lab’s waste disposal procedures.

HELPFUL TIP: If your bleach is no longer the expected yellowish color, refresh or replace the bleach to ensure it remains effective.

Thank you for helping keep the shared workspace clean and safe!

Best,

Max

labMeetings.title: Lab Meeting!
labMeetings.description: 3600 Civic Center Blvd., RM16-102B @ 11:30am. Join us for pizza and some general announcements/updates!
